publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2025-12-19 00:07:38 UTC.
profiledesc.langusage: Description is written in: English, Latin script.

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Delta Sigma Theta records

scopecontent.head: Content Description
scopecontent.p: Collection contains documents relating to the founding of Delta Sigma Theta and the Cornell University formerly Theta Chapter now Mu Gamma chapter, publications, clippings, ephemera, and other material relating to Delta Sigma Theta Sorority Incorporated.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Delta Sigma Theta Sorority records, #37-4-4592. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Access to Box 1 is restricted to members of Delta Sigma Theta Sorority, Inc.

did.unittitle: Series I. Sorority Books, Documents, and Ephemera
"Oriented to Serve" by Ford Jour; open edition colored print; founders of Delta Sigma Theta
"In Search of Sisterhood" by Paula Giddings, signed
"The History of African American Fraternities and Sororities: The Divine Nine" by Lawrence C. Ross, Jr.
Delta Sigma Theta shield counted cross stitch kit
Clipping with photographs of the 22 founders
Delta Sigma Theta Diamond Jubilee celebration packet
Photocopy of "Believe in Yourself" poem
Sojourner's Circle meeting minutes and mentor agenda
Photographs circa 1975

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photographs from Barbara Headley showing student life and Ithaca College graduation.

did.unittitle: Photographs circa 1979

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photographs from Sharon Lombard showing student life and campus events.

did.unittitle: Carolyn Jackson scrapbook

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Items include Renee Lynn Terry obituary and memorial program, letters of greeting from members to Carolyn Jackson as a big sister, photographs of events, also a photograph of members of the Ithaca College Omega Psi Phi Fraternity, Eastern Rrgional Conference Philadelphia 1984 song book, program for Young, Gifted and Black concert at Boynton Middle School

did.unittitle: Event ephemera collected by Tatia R. Mays

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Event posters and programs including for Fall Rush, Jabberwock 1988, and School Daze Party

did.unittitle: Delta Sigma Theta pennant
Series II. Restricted to Members of Delta Sigma Theta Sorority, Inc.
Delta Sigma Theta Sorority Inc. Protocol and Traditions Manual
The Membership Intake Program of the Grand Chapter of Delta Sigma Theta Sorority Inc. - 3rd edition
The Official Ritual of Grand Chapeter of Delta Sigma Theta Sorority Incorporated - 8th Edition
The Official Ritual of Grand Chapeter of Delta Sigma Theta Sorority Incorporated - 11th Edition
Photocopy of "Delta the Elephant" with explanation of elephant significance
Miscellaneous meeting minutes and official correspondence
The Pyramid Study Guide with National Delta Achievement Test insert
Grand Chapter Constitution and By-Laws
The Pyramid Handbook - Revised Edition
Chapter documents from Circa 1975

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Delta Oath, information sheet including past National Presidents and other details, local chapter membership list. Materials from Barbara Headley.

did.unittitle: Delta Sigma Theta Rush booklets

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Rush themes include, Ever Majestic; Achievement Against the Odds; Choice, Change Challenge, Looking Toward the Future; and Diamond Jubilee (2 copies).

did.unittitle: Series III. Digital Material
In Search of Theta Chapter at Cornell: Profiles of the Charter Members of the Theta Chapter of Delta Sigma Theta Sorority at Cornell University, 1920-1923

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Compiled by Pamela Davis-Clarke, Esq., Cornell University Class of 1984, with assistance from Shaunna Marie Stevens, National Heritage and Archives Committee, Delta Sigma Theta Sorority, Inc. and Melanie Stewart, Esq. Cornell University Class of 2010.
